query:
SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM device_network_intent dni
            JOIN network existing_n ON existing_n.id = dni.network_id
            JOIN network new_n ON new_n.id = $2
            WHERE dni.device_id = $1
              AND existing_n.ssid = new_n.ssid
              AND dni.network_id != $2
        ) as "exists!"
